text: Hospital ka final bill dekh kar mera dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rone ka mann kar raha hai. Pehle hi kirana shop doob chuki hai aur ab bachi-kuchi savings bhi chali gayi toh main poori tarah flood ho gaya hoon. Is waqt main koi bank loan ya aage ka raasta nahi soch pa raha, bas ek gehra sadma aur panic mehsus ho raha hai jisme saans lena mushkil hai.

Neighborhood shame ki wajah se pehle hi ghar se nikalna dushwar tha, aur aaj is medical bill ne toh mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi purane debt spiral aur logon ke taane goonj rahe hain aur main bas ek kone mein baith kar roye ja raha hoon. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi logically sujh nahi raha, bas lag raha hai ki main sabka gunehgaar hoon.

Medical bill bharne ke baad jab bank balance zero dekha, toh mere hosh ud gaye aur main bas sunn hokar baitha raha. Papa ne kisan hokar jo umeed mujh par lagayi thi aur maine jo business khada kiya tha, wo ab is financial crisis mein bikhar gaya hai aur main rone ka control nahi kar pa raha. Is waqt main naya startup plan ya EMI ke baare mein soch hi nahi sakta, bas ye darr mujhe duba raha hai.

Kirana shop ke loss ke baad parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ka jo pressure tha, aaj is hospital bill ne usse ek extreme breakdown mein badal diya hai. Main kuch bhi logically nahi soch pa raha, bas aankhon ke aage andhera aa raha hai aur dimaag blank ho gaya hai. Family head hone ke naate sab meri taraf dekh rahe hain, par ye flood of emotions mujhe saans lene bhi nahi de raha.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi aur ab is business failure ke baad medical bill ne meri bachi-kuchi himmat bhi saaf kar di hai, main poori tarah sunn ho chuka hoon. Health neglect karne ka nateeja samne hai par dimaag mein koi rasta nahi dikh raha, bas ek gehra despair hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek gehra sannata hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai.
